events.text: Goal!  Switzerland 0, Ecuador 1. Enner Valencia (Ecuador) header from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Walter Ayoví with a cross   following a set piece situation.
Goal!  Switzerland 1, Ecuador 1. Admir Mehmedi (Switzerland) header from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Ricardo Rodríguez with a cross   following a corner.
Juan Paredes (Ecuador) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Johan Djourou (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Switzerland 2, Ecuador 1. Haris Seferovic (Switzerland) left footed shot from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Ricardo Rodríguez with a cross.
